name: Terlingua Night Sky Drive
locationSummary: Desert pullouts and low-light ridgelines just outside the main Terlingua glow.
summary: A guided evening drive to remote ridgelines where city light never reaches and the Milky Way arches overhead.
description: Leave the highway glow behind and settle into real darkness. Chuck guides small groups to hand-picked pullouts where the sky opens up completely—no light pollution, no noise, just you and more stars than you thought possible. Bring a thermos. Wear layers. Return changed.
